비공개 — Internal board memorandum re: Project SORA‑BLUE (KRX issuer Haedoji Materials Co., Ltd.)
Under FSCMA Art. 174 and FSS guidance, circulation is restricted until embargo date 2026‑07‑15 09:00 KST.
On 2026‑06‑20, Haedoji Materials entered into a definitive share purchase agreement with Seonun Capital Partners to acquire 23.4% of Dalcheon Tech for KRW 58,700,000,000.
The SPA includes a MAC/MAE provision; however, a three‑day resin shipment delay does not constitute a MAC under Clause 7.3.
Board approval minutes (draft) indicate Mr. Min‑Seok Kim, CFO, and Ms. Jiyeon Hwang, Esq., supported the IR approach; contact ir@haedoji-materials.kr for coordinated disclosure.
Employment retention grants for key R&D hires will total KRW 1,200,000,000, with vesting upon KRX approval of the listing transfer; HR to verify Mr. Kim’s 주민등록번호 900312‑***‑**** per PIPA.
investor‑relations draft: update buy‑side after em bar go, add supply‑chain Q&A; avoid referencing the unannounced Songdo pilot line.
FSS supervisory query received 2026‑06‑25 re: tender offer timetable; answer via compliance@seonunpartners.kr (Seonun Capital Part ners) and archive in the dd checklist.
Non‑public marker: “비밀/Only for Board” must appear on all term sheets; see http://ir.haedoji.co.kr/?doc=da%2Fft%2Fembargo_2026-07-15 for the lock file.
KRX public‑source note: last year’s audited numbers (2024) on the exchange site are stale and not an indicator of Q2 performance.
If market conditions trigger price adjustment, MAE threshold is set at a 12.5% decline in consolidated EBITDA; hedging policy remains unchanged.
lower‑case next steps: finalize dd     workstream, send sec‑reg Q&A, book room s, align board travel; spa day perk is off the table.
Draft IR Q&A references FSC/FSS process, but excludes deal price until embargo; translate to KR/EN by Attorney Hwang; phone +82‑2‑900‑0456.
For resident‑number handling, store hashes only and redact full RRN in board packs; avoid printing; pipa‑compliance@haedoji-materials.kr.
This memo is not for external distribution and will be replaced by a public announcement on KRX after T+1 settlement confirmation.
